title: Unit 01 in the Magma
wikitext:
[]: Unit 01 in the Magma             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Feb 11, 2007 12:34 pm ok, in the episode with the PRE-Angel, we all know that Unit 02 goes down to retrieve the egg, but it goes wrong and attacks her well, after the Angel is dead Asuka starts falling, but then Unit 01 jumps in and grabs her. but Unit 02 was rapidly compressing due to the pressure, but Unit 01 wasnt. why?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Feb 11, 2007 12:38 pm Yui is equipped with purple narrativium, while Kyoko is equipped with red narrativium. Like kryptonite, the different colours have different effects.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Sun Feb 11, 2007 3:37 pm Unit 02 would blend in the lava and be lost forever. In contrast, purple never works well with red in any situation. Unless it's the 80's.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Feb 11, 2007 4:03 pm Ahh, the magic of narrativium .

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Feb 11, 2007 4:40 pm Unit 02 was being retracted upward. Sandalphon slashed her pipes just prior to being destroyed. The only plausible explanation is that afterwards Unit 02 was reeled upwards enough that Unit 01 could safely jump in and not be affected by the pressure. Also, let's not forget that it's a cartoon.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 11, 2007 4:48 pm You'd think that, in theory, an Eva using her ATF properly wouldn't feel a thing down in that magma. Their relly Sandalphon appears to have been living there quite happily for some time. Oh, wait. We're talking pilots here. Well, we can always lay the blame on Yui-sama, who is capable of generating a limitless supply of narrativium even before she acquires an S^2 Engine.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Feb 11, 2007 11:40 pm whoops, i intended this to b in the discussion room.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 12, 2007 8:12 am Sachiel_13 wrote: whoops, i intended this to b in the discussion room.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Feb 14, 2007 11:23 pm but we're discussing how Eva 01 was able to survive in the magma

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Thu Feb 15, 2007 3:09 pm This is a forum for casual discussion of Evangelion. Topics like "Asuka is hot!" or "Which Eva kicks the most ass?" belong here.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Feb 15, 2007 10:17 pm The Bastard King wrote: Actually, the key word in this case would most likely be something more like "plothole".

Article: Unit 01 in the Magma
[]: Unit 01 in the Magma             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Feb 11, 2007 12:34 pm ok, in the episode with the PRE-Angel, we all know that Unit 02 goes down to retrieve the egg, but it goes wrong and attacks her well, after the Angel is dead Asuka starts falling, but then Unit 01 jumps in and grabs her. but Unit 02 was rapidly compressing due to the pressure, but Unit 01 wasnt. why?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Feb 11, 2007 12:38 pm Yui is equipped with purple narrativium, while Kyoko is equipped with red narrativium. Like kryptonite, the different colours have different effects.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Sun Feb 11, 2007 3:37 pm Unit 02 would blend in the lava and be lost forever. In contrast, purple never works well with red in any situation. Unless it's the 80's.

The only plausible explanation is that afterwards Unit 02 was reeled upwards enough that Unit 01 could safely jump in and not be affected by the pressure. Also, let's not forget that it's a cartoon.

Their relly Sandalphon appears to have been living there quite happily for some time. Oh, wait. We're talking pilots here. Well, we can always lay the blame on Yui-sama, who is capable of generating a limitless supply of narrativium even before she acquires an S^2 Engine.
